response.overview: The film follows a migrated labour couple and the labour contractor at a construction site in a rapidly developing Indian city. It focuses on their inter-dependency , care for each other and attempt to co exist beyond the social morality or their own personal disasters. More than the simple binary of right-wrong or oppressed-oppressor the characters are portrayed in different shades of grey, to cope up with the complexities of our time.

production_companies.name: Film and Television Institute of India

response.title: Color: Grey
